name: Bananas Mexicana
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the bananas and split them lengthwise.
2. Arrange the banana halves in a well-buttered baking dish.
3. Mix the orange juice and brown sugar together.
4. Pour the mixture over the bananas.
5. Dot the bananas with butter.
6. Spread the shredded coconut evenly over all.
7. Bake at 400 degrees for 10 to 15 minutes, or until the coconut is crisp and golden brown.
